scripts.load:smoke: docker run --rm --user "$(id -u):$(id -g)" --add-host=host.docker.internal:host-gateway -v "$PWD/test:/scripts" -w /scripts -e BASE_URL=http://host.docker.internal:9999 grafana/k6 run smoke.js
scripts.load:dev: docker run --rm --user "$(id -u):$(id -g)" --add-host=host.docker.internal:host-gateway -v "$PWD/test:/scripts" -w /scripts -e BASE_URL=http://host.docker.internal:9999 -e LOAD_RATE=50 -e LOAD_DURATION=30s -e LOAD_PRE_ALLOCATED_VUS=20 -e LOAD_MAX_VUS=50 -e LOAD_LIMIT=600 grafana/k6 run test.js
scripts.load:full: docker run --rm --user "$(id -u):$(id -g)" --add-host=host.docker.internal:host-gateway -v "$PWD/test:/scripts" -w /scripts -e BASE_URL=http://host.docker.internal:9999 grafana/k6 run test.js
